title: OP_PUSH response body
description: Sync push acknowledgement. ack_lsn is the server-assigned monotonic Log Sequence Number for this event (idempotency anchor). registry_version reflects the server's registry state at push time. idempotent_replay is true if the dedupe key matched a prior push within the dedupe window.

ack_lsn.description: Server-assigned monotonic LSN for this event.

idempotent_replay.description: True when the dedupe key matched a prior push within the dedupe window.
